title: Use synchronous cancellation for CoAP request timeout work
description: Trigger: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_client.c response and send-failure paths call k_work_cancel_delayable() at lines 195 and 292, then immediately k_free(ctx). If the delayable timeout work is already queued or running, Zephyr may still enter request_timeout_handler with the freed request_ctx. Impact: timing-dependent use-after-free in the CoAP client under response/timeout races or immediate send failures. Fix by synchronously cancelling/flushing the delayable work before freeing, or by moving ownership to a refcounted/lifetime-safe context.
close_reason: Implemented fixes in assigned subagents and ran available focused checks; full Zephyr builds remain blocked by existing workspace/module setup issues.
